paper_title: Genetic and Molecular Analysis of N. fasciata

methods.description: Collection and preparation of tissue and blood samples from N. fasciata individuals for DNA extraction and analysis.

steps.description: Tissue samples were collected from 105 N. fasciata individuals.
steps.searchable_summary: collect tissue samples from N. fasciata individuals

steps.description: Blood samples (50-100 μL) were taken from each individual by pricking the brachial vein with a sterile needle and collected with a microcapillary tube, then stored in absolute ethanol.
steps.searchable_summary: collect and store blood samples in ethanol

steps.description: Total DNA was extracted from blood samples using proteinase K digestion followed by phenol-chloroform extraction.
steps.searchable_summary: extract DNA using proteinase K and phenol-chloroform

steps.description: For museum samples, total DNA was extracted using a PureLink Genomic DNA Kit.
steps.searchable_summary: extract DNA using PureLink Genomic DNA Kit

steps.description: Amplified the mitochondrial NADH dehydrogenase subunit 2 gene (ND2) by PCR, using primers LMET and H6313.
Amplified a fragment of the nuclear beta-fibrinogen gene intron 5 (FIB-5) using the primers FIB5 and FIB6.
Performed PCR reactions in a 10 μl volume containing 30 ng of template DNA, 1X PCR buffer, 0.25 mM of each dNTP, 1 mM of each primer, 1.5 mM MgCl2, and 0.5 unit of Taq polymerase.
steps.searchable_summary: set up PCR reactions with specified reagents

steps.description: Used the Shrimp Alkaline Phosphatase and Exonuclease I protocol for cleanup PCR products.
steps.searchable_summary: clean up PCR products using Shrimp Alkaline Phosphatase and Exonuclease I

steps.description: Sequencing reactions were performed with BigDye Terminator v3.1 Cycle Sequencing Kit.
steps.searchable_summary: perform sequencing with BigDye Terminator v3.1

steps.description: Edited the sequences in GENEIOUS 6.0.6 and coded double peaks in both strands of FIB-5 sequence electropherograms using the IUPAC nucleotide code.
steps.searchable_summary: edit sequences and code double peaks using GENEIOUS

steps.description: Resolved the gametic phase using the algorithm Phase implemented in DnaSP 5.10.
steps.searchable_summary: resolve gametic phase using Phase algorithm in DnaSP

methods.description: Analysis of ND2 and FIB-5 sequences to determine haplotype diversity, genetic structure, and correlation with geographic distances.

steps.description: Obtained ND2 (942 bp) and FIB-5 (487 bp) sequences for all 105 N. fasciata samples.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain ND2 and FIB-5 sequences for samples

steps.description: Observed 36 haplotypes for ND2 and 23 for FIB-5.
steps.searchable_summary: identify haplotypes for ND2 and FIB-5

steps.description: Represented ND2 haplotype network in a star-like pattern indicating recent population expansion.
Analyzed genetic structure using BAPS analysis showing support for one genetic group.
steps.searchable_summary: perform BAPS analysis for genetic structure

steps.description: Performed Mantel tests for ND2 and FIB-5 to assess correlation between geographic distances and genetic differentiation.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct Mantel tests for geographic and genetic correlation

steps.description: Analyzed influence of geographic gradients in genetic diversity using ND2 and FIB-5.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze geographic influence on genetic diversity

steps.description: Conducted neutrality tests considering all sample sites as a single genetic population.
steps.searchable_summary: perform neutrality tests on genetic population
